title: BLM訴求：炸毀總統山，耶魯改名，白宮前加建「黑宮」

replies.msg: 食飽屎冇飯痾

Jeffrey Ngo said: "As a democracy movement, human rights, Demosisto supports the Black Lives Matter struggle. And as I observe, many Hong Kong people are the same."



"I don't think Mr. Trump's role is so important. In my opinion, with or without Mr. Trump, the majority of Americans will receive the importance of standing up to China's tyranny, "he said.

"For example, Mr. Trump, although he seems to be anti-China, he does not support human rights. And for us, human rights campaigners, it is very worrying."

"But the fact that people hate China does not mean it is good for Hong Kong. Only when people stand up for human rights, for democracy and freedom will it be beneficial for Hong Kong," Jeffrey Ngo explained.

Jeffrey said that was why Demosisto emphasized bipartisanism while campaigning for Hong Kong support in Washington DC.

Jeffrey Ngo said: "As a democracy movement, human rights, Demosisto supports the Black Lives Matter struggle. And as I observe, many Hong Kong people are the same."

原文（越南文）：
https://www.bbc.com/vietnamese/world-52989821

仲有：
一些示威者還宣稱，美國（United States of America）甚至整個美洲大陸的名字亞美利加（Americas）也有問題，因為這個名字來自於意大利殖民者和奴隸販子亞美利哥·維斯普奇（Amerigo Vespucci）。

據《紐約郵報》報道，在美國的“羅得島與普羅維登斯莊園州”（The State of Rhode Island and Providence Plantations），州長雷蒙多（Gina Raimondo）近日簽署了一項行政命令，要求將州名去掉後半部分“普羅維登斯莊園”幾個字，改為“羅得島州”；該命令還要求，所有州的執行機構從官網上刪除“普羅維登斯莊園”幾個字。報道稱，“普羅維登斯莊園”一詞的含義與奴隸制有關。

有媒體稱：接下來，以被指為“奴隸主”的美國國父喬治·華盛頓（George Washington）名字命名的“華盛頓州”（State of Washington）和首都“華盛頓特區”（Washington, D.C.）勢必也面臨衝擊。

Jeffrey Ngo said: "As a democracy movement, human rights, Demosisto supports the Black Lives Matter struggle. And as I observe, many Hong Kong people are the same."



"I don't think Mr. Trump's role is so important. In my opinion, with or without Mr. Trump, the majority of Americans will receive the importance of standing up to China's tyranny, "he said.

"For example, Mr. Trump, although he seems to be anti-China, he does not support human rights. And for us, human rights campaigners, it is very worrying."

"But the fact that people hate China does not mean it is good for Hong Kong. Only when people stand up for human rights, for democracy and freedom will it be beneficial for Hong Kong," Jeffrey Ngo explained.

Jeffrey said that was why Demosisto emphasized bipartisanism while campaigning for Hong Kong support in Washington DC.

Jeffrey Ngo said: "As a democracy movement, human rights, Demosisto supports the Black Lives Matter struggle. And as I observe, many Hong Kong people are the same."

http://www.rfi.fr/tw/%E6%94%BF%E6%B2%BB/20200624-%E7%BE%8E%E5%9C%8B%E5%8F%8D%E7%A8%AE%E6%97%8F%E4%B8%BB%E7%BE%A9%E8%80%85%E6%8F%90%E6%96%B0%E8%A6%81%E6%B1%82-%E7%82%B8%E6%AF%80%E7%B8%BD%E7%B5%B1%E5%B1%B1%E5%9B%9B%E7%B8%BD%E7%B5%B1%E5%83%8F%EF%BC%8C%E8%80%B6%E9%AD%AF%E5%A4%A7%E5%AD%B8%E6%94%B9%E5%90%8D%EF%BC%8C%E7%99%BD%E5%AE%AE%E5%89%8D%E5%BB%BA%E9%BB%91%E5%AE%AE%E8%87%AA%E6%B2%BB%E5%8D%80



仲有：
一些示威者還宣稱，美國（United States of America）甚至整個美洲大陸的名字亞美利加（Americas）也有問題，因為這個名字來自於意大利殖民者和奴隸販子亞美利哥·維斯普奇（Amerigo Vespucci）。

據《紐約郵報》報道，在美國的“羅得島與普羅維登斯莊園州”（The State of Rhode Island and Providence Plantations），州長雷蒙多（Gina Raimondo）近日簽署了一項行政命令，要求將州名去掉後半部分“普羅維登斯莊園”幾個字，改為“羅得島州”；該命令還要求，所有州的執行機構從官網上刪除“普羅維登斯莊園”幾個字。報道稱，“普羅維登斯莊園”一詞的含義與奴隸制有關。

有媒體稱：接下來，以被指為“奴隸主”的美國國父喬治·華盛頓（George Washington）名字命名的“華盛頓州”（State of Washington）和首都“華盛頓特區”（Washington, D.C.）勢必也面臨衝擊。
